info.title: mcpifier
info.description: Command-line server and tool for Mcpifier - a zero-code MCP (Model Context Protocol) gateway that exposes an existing REST API as an MCP server.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Mcpifier - an MCP-to-REST gateway that can run in HTTP or stdio mode

options.name: --swagger
options.description: The path or URL of a Swagger/OpenAPI specification JSON file from which to generate tool mappings

options.name: --mappings
options.description: The path to a tool mappings JSON file from which to load tool mappings

options.name: --settings
options.description: The path to any additional configuration JSON file to load

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Start the Mcpifier server in HTTP or stdio mode

options.name: --swagger
options.description: The path or URL of a Swagger/OpenAPI specification JSON file from which to generate tool mappings

options.name: --mappings
options.description: The path to a tool mappings JSON file from which to load tool mappings

options.name: --settings
options.description: The path to any additional configuration JSON file to load

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate tool mappings from a Swagger/OpenAPI specification

options.name: --swagger
options.description: The path or URL of the Swagger/OpenAPI specification JSON file from which to generate tool mappings

options.name: --output
options.description: The output path for the generated mapping file [default: mappings.json]

options.name: --settings
options.description: The path to any additional configuration JSON file to load
